Q1_orb_vs_vwap.reason: ORB N=5 (2 wins/5, pnl=-110, PF=17/127=0.134). VWAP N=17 (4 wins/17, pnl=-145, PF=65/210=0.310). S11 adds RIVN (ORB, loss -8) and MSFT (VWAP, win +1). ORB PF dropped further (0.143→0.134); VWAP PF improved slightly (0.305→0.310). Both below 1. VWAP now higher PF and better win rate. Still indeterminate — both unprofitable overall.

Q2_signal_age.reason: S11 adds MSFT 100.1min and RIVN 105.1min, both in 90-120 bucket. 90-120 N=5 (2 wins/5, pnl=-63). <30 N=4 (+13), 30-60 N=4 (-97), 60-90 N=4 (-87), 90-120 N=5 (-63). 30-60 remains weakest (0 wins, pnl=-97). <30 still only positive bucket. 90-120 improves to 2 wins from 1 but still negative pnl. No clear monotonic age→performance relationship.
Q2_signal_age.note: All four primary age buckets at N≥3. 30-60 worst. <30 only positive. 90-120 shows 40% win rate but -63 pnl.

Q3_dte.reason: S11 adds MSFT DTE=0 (win +1) and RIVN DTE=3 (loss -8). DTE=0 N=11 (3 wins/11, 27%, pnl=-116). DTE=2-3 N=5 (2 wins/5, 40%, pnl=-72). DTE=0 win rate improves slightly (20%→27%) but pnl essentially unchanged (-117→-116). DTE=2-3 win rate drops (50%→40%) with RIVN loss adding to pnl drag. DTE=2-3 still shows better win rate than DTE=0 but gap narrowing.

Q4_etf_vs_single_stock.reason: S11 adds MSFT (win +1) and RIVN (loss -8) both to single-stock. Single-stock N=6 (3 wins/6, 50%, pnl=-37, avg=-6.17/trade). ETF N=16 unchanged (3 wins/16, 18.75%, pnl=-218, avg=-13.63/trade). Single-stock win rate holds at 50% vs ETF 18.75%. Avg pnl improves slightly (-7.50→-6.17). Pattern POTENTIALLY SUPPORTED but single-stock pnl remains negative overall despite better win rate.

Q5_quality_scores.reason: S11 adds MSFT q=2 (win +1) and RIVN q=2 (loss -8). Quality=2 N=9 (3 wins/9, 33%, pnl=-103). Quality=3 N=5 unchanged (2 wins/5, 40%, pnl=-4). Quality=2 pnl deteriorates further (-96→-103) despite win rate holding. Quality=3 still best pnl. Gap widens: q=3 avg=-0.80/trade vs q=2 avg=-11.44/trade. Still indeterminate but q=3 advantage is strengthening.

Q6_scanner_score.reason: S11 adds MSFT score=70 (70+ bucket, win +1) and RIVN score=60 (60-69 bucket, loss -8). Score 60-69 N=2 (0 wins, pnl=-12). Score 70+ N=1 (1 win, pnl=+1). Both below N=3 minimum. Existing buckets unchanged: <40 N=3 (0 wins, -82), 40-49 N=4 (0 wins, -46), 50-59 N=7 (4 wins 57%, -116). 60-69 now 0/2 wins with another loss (RIVN). 70+ positive pnl but N=1 only. Still indeterminate — 60-69 and 70+ both below minimum.

Q7_fill_path.reason: S11 adds MSFT (direct, win +1) and RIVN (direct, loss -8). Recovered N=15 unchanged (2 wins/15, 13%, pnl=-280, avg=-18.67/trade). Direct N=7 (4 wins/7, 57%, pnl=+25, avg=+3.57/trade). Direct pnl eroded from +32 to +25 with RIVN loss, but still positive. Direct win rate holds at 57% (vs 13% recovered). Gap remains large. Pattern potentially SUPPORTED — direct fills consistently outperform recovered across sessions S6 through S11.

voided_attempts.note: yfinance daily data failure (same pattern as S9/S10). Would have been zero-trade STANDBY session even if full window ran. CronCreate loop does not survive Firecracker VM teardown — cron is session-only and dies with the VM.

voided_attempts.reason: Killed before 12:30 ET with 0 new positions. Per protocol: 'If killed before 12:30 ET with 0 positions: VOIDED.' Three windows killed by Firecracker VM teardown. All 38 symbols STANDBY (low_volume_chop) every scan. RIVN carryover from S11 closed at cycle 1 of window 1 via max_hold — that trade attributed to S11 not S12.
voided_attempts.note: RIVN260702C00017000 carryover from S11 correctly recovered and closed. P&L attributed to S11 per carryover convention.

voided_attempts.reason: External shell/process termination. Session runner launched as background process (&) in bash shell; shell was recycled between conversation turns, killing the child process at cycle 22. No positions opened, no orders placed, zero broker exposure. Session window incomplete (09:30–09:40 ET vs required 09:30–12:30 ET).

Remote container killed process with SIGKILL during conversation inactivity. nohup protects against SIGHUP only; container resource management sent SIGKILL which cannot be caught or logged. Process died cleanly mid-STANDBY (RVOL < 0.5, no entries placed). Scores were rising at time of death (IWM/SMH/ARM=70, QQQ/XLK=62). No positions, no orders, no broker exposure. Session window incomplete (09:30–10:05 ET vs required 09:30–12:30 ET).
voided_attempts.fix_required: Session runner must be executed on a persistent host (local machine, VPS, or persistent server) outside the ephemeral Claude Code remote container. The container cannot sustain a 3-hour background process through inactivity periods.

S12: VOIDED. S13: VOIDED (yfinance failure + VM kills). 6 valid sessions complete, 4 remaining.
